query:
SELECT contract_no, customer_name, period, paid_at, 
  principal, interest, fee, penalty, unlock_fee, discount, overpaid, bad_debt, total_amount,
  is_bad_debt_row, is_close_row, payment_external_id
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE customer_name LIKE '%สุภาพม%'
ORDER BY period, paid_at
LIMIT 20

  principal, interest, fee, penalty, unlock_fee, discount, overpaid, bad_debt, total_amount,
  is_bad_debt_row, is_close_row, payment_external_id
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE customer_name LIKE '%สุภาพม%'
ORDER BY period, paid_at
LIMIT 20
